items.title: Shaping API payloads
items.description: Turn a list of questions or documents into the message/chunk structures an LLM API expects with a single list comprehension.

items.title: Filtering retrieved chunks
items.description: Keep only retrieved passages above a similarity threshold: [c for c in chunks if c.score >= 0.8] before passing them to the model.

items.title: Building lookup dictionaries
items.description: Create {id: embedding} or {term: definition} maps from parallel data in one dict comprehension for fast lookups.

items.title: Deduplicating with sets
items.description: Collect unique tags, tokens or document IDs using a set comprehension to avoid repeats.

items.title: Memory-safe aggregates
items.description: Feed a generator expression to sum()/max()/any() to compute totals over large or streamed data without materializing a list.
